ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the article */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the article */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text excerpt of the article */,
  "url_pdf" TEXT /* URL to the PDF version of the article */,
  "cluster_id" TEXT /* ID of the cluster the article belongs to */,
  "num_versions" INTEGER /* Number of versions of the article */,
  "url_versions" TEXT /* URL to the versions of the article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the article */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of the article (e.g., research paper, conference proceeding, book chapter) */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal or conference where the article was published */,
  "doi_url" TEXT /* URL to the DOI of the article */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal or conference */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the article */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the article is published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "cluster_type" TEXT /* Type of the cluster (e.g., thematic, methodological) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the cluster was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the cluster was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of the version (e.g., draft, final, revised) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., published, unpublished) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the citation belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the citation */,
  "num_citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of the citation (e.g., journal, conference, book) */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was recorded */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation (e.g., Google Scholar, CrossRef) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the keyword belongs to */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword text */,
  "keyword_weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the keyword in the article */,
  "keyword_type" TEXT /* Type of the keyword (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the author belongs to */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Author name */,
  "author_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., university, institute) */,
  "author_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the author (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "author_orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the article (e.g., lead author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abstracts" (
  "abstract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abstract */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the abstract belongs to */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract text */,
  "abstract_type" TEXT /* Type of the abstract (e.g., structured, unstructured) */,
  "abstract_language" TEXT /* Language of the abstract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abstract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abstracts_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, editor, admin) */,
  "user_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "similarity_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity measure */,
  "article_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first article */,
  "article_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second article */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two articles */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of the similarity measure (e.g., cosine similarity, Jaccard index) */,
  "measure_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the similarity (e.g., TF-IDF, word embeddings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_measures_article_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("article_id1") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_measures_article_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("article_id2") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article similarity */,
  "article_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first article */,
  "article_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second article */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two articles */,
  "similarity_type" TEXT /* Type of the similarity (e.g., content, citation) */,
  "similarity_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the similarity (e.g., TF-IDF, Jaccard index) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_similarity_article_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("article_id1") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_similarity_article_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("article_id2") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" TEXT /* ID of the cluster the article belongs to */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "cluster_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for clustering (e.g., K-means, hierarchical clustering) */,
  "cluster_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the clustering algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_clusters_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
